tasks.title: Design System and UI/UX Wireframes for IELTS Learning App
tasks.description: Create a comprehensive design system including color palette, typography, spacing, and component styles. Design wireframes for main pages: Dashboard, Daily Plan, Vocabulary, Reading, Listening, Writing, Speaking, Grammar, AI Tutor, User Profile, and Admin Panel. Ensure designs are clean, simple, motivating, and responsive for desktop and mobile. Include navigation layout and user flow emphasizing ease of daily use and minimal overwhelm.
acceptanceCriteria: Design system document created
Wireframes for all main pages completed
Responsive design considerations included
Navigation and user flow clearly defined
tasks.expectedResult: Design system and wireframes ready to guide frontend implementation with clear UI/UX principles

outputPlan.description: Design system documentation with colors, typography, and components
Wireframes for all main app pages

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides UI/UX foundation for frontend development

tasks.title: Define Database Schema for IELTS Learning App
tasks.description: Design a PostgreSQL database schema using Prisma ORM to support all app features: users, study plans, vocabulary, reading passages, listening exercises, writing submissions, speaking prompts, grammar lessons, AI content, progress tracking, and admin data. Include relations, indexes, and constraints to ensure data integrity and efficient queries.
acceptanceCriteria: Prisma schema file created with all required models
Relations and constraints properly defined
Schema supports all main features and admin data
tasks.expectedResult: Prisma schema file defining complete database structure ready for migration

outputPlan.description: Prisma schema file defining database models and relations

metadata.inputContext: App feature requirements and data needs
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Defines data structure backbone for backend and frontend

tasks.title: Design REST API Endpoints and Backend Module Structure
tasks.description: Define REST API endpoints for all app features including authentication, daily study plan, vocabulary, reading, listening, writing, speaking, grammar, AI tutor, dashboard, user profile, and admin panel. Design backend module structure in NestJS with clear separation of concerns, validation, error handling, and logging. Document API routes, request/response schemas, and authentication requirements.
acceptanceCriteria: API endpoint list with methods and paths documented
Request and response schemas defined
Backend module structure diagram and description created
tasks.expectedResult: Complete API design and backend module plan ready for implementation

outputPlan.description: API endpoints documentation with request/response schemas
Backend module structure and design document

metadata.inputContext: Database schema and app feature requirements
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides backend implementation blueprint and API contract

tasks.title: Initialize Project with Frontend and Backend Boilerplate Setup
tasks.description: Set up the project repository with frontend using React + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind CSS and backend using NestJS + TypeScript. Configure ESLint, Prettier, environment variables, and Docker support for local development. Add initial folder structure for frontend and backend following clean architecture principles.
acceptanceCriteria: Frontend and backend projects initialized
Basic linting and formatting configured
Dockerfile and docker-compose.yml added for local dev
Folder structure created
tasks.expectedResult: Project initialized with frontend and backend boilerplate, linting, formatting, and Docker support

outputPlan.description: Frontend React + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS project
Backend NestJS + TypeScript project
Dockerfile for app container
Docker Compose file for local development

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides foundation for development with configured projects and tools

tasks.title: Implement User Authentication Module with Email/Password and OAuth
tasks.description: Develop backend authentication module in NestJS with email/password registration and login, password hashing, JWT token issuance, and OAuth login support (Google). Create frontend login and registration pages with form validation and error handling. Integrate authentication state management and protected routes in frontend.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend auth module with JWT and OAuth implemented
Frontend login and registration pages functional
Authentication state managed and protected routes enforced
Unit tests for auth backend and frontend components
tasks.expectedResult: Secure user authentication system implemented and tested

outputPlan.description: Authentication module with JWT and OAuth
Login page with form and OAuth buttons
Registration page with form validation

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides secure user access foundation for the app

tasks.title: Implement Daily IELTS Study Plan Backend and Frontend
tasks.description: Create backend service to generate daily study plans based on user profile (target band, current level, available time, exam date). Store and update daily tasks, progress, streaks, completed lessons, and weak areas. Develop frontend Daily Plan page showing today's tasks clearly with progress indicators and motivational messages. Include API endpoints for fetching and updating study plans.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend service generates and stores daily study plans
Frontend Daily Plan page displays tasks and progress
API endpoints documented and functional
Unit and integration tests cover study plan logic
tasks.expectedResult: Daily IELTS study plan feature fully implemented and tested

outputPlan.description: Backend service and controller for daily study plans
Frontend page showing today's study tasks and progress

metadata.inputContext: User authentication module and database schema
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables personalized daily study guidance and progress tracking

tasks.title: Implement Vocabulary Learning Module with Spaced Repetition
tasks.description: Develop backend models and services for vocabulary topics, words with detailed info (meaning, pronunciation, examples, collocations, synonyms, antonyms, IELTS usage), spaced repetition scheduling, and user saved difficult words. Create frontend Vocabulary page with topic selection, word details display, spaced repetition review interface, and ability to save words. Include short reading passage generation using selected vocabulary. Provide API endpoints for vocabulary data and user progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend vocabulary models and spaced repetition implemented
Frontend vocabulary pages functional with topic filtering and word details
Short reading passage generation integrated
API endpoints documented and tested
Unit and integration tests cover vocabulary logic
tasks.expectedResult: Vocabulary learning feature with spaced repetition fully implemented and tested

outputPlan.description: Backend models and services for vocabulary and spaced repetition
Frontend page for vocabulary learning by topic

metadata.inputContext: Daily study plan module and database schema
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides core vocabulary learning with spaced repetition and topic focus

tasks.title: Implement Reading Practice Module with IELTS-style Passages and Questions
tasks.description: Create backend models and services for reading passages by topic and difficulty, question types (True/False/Not Given, Matching Headings, Multiple Choice, Sentence Completion, Summary Completion), answers with explanations, and user accuracy/speed tracking. Develop frontend Reading Practice page with passage display, interactive questions, answer submission, and feedback with explanations. Include API endpoints for reading data and user progress.

Frontend reading practice page functional with interactive questions

tasks.title: Implement Listening Practice Module with Daily Exercises and Transcript Features
tasks.description: Develop backend models and services for daily listening exercises including audio files, transcripts, gap-fill questions, multiple choice, and shadowing practice. Support replay by sentence and track difficult words from transcripts. Create frontend Listening Practice page with audio player, interactive questions, transcript display with highlighting, and shadowing practice interface. Provide API endpoints for listening data and user progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend listening models and services implemented
Frontend listening practice page functional with audio and transcript features

tasks.title: Implement Writing Practice Module with AI Feedback and History
tasks.description: Create backend models and services for IELTS Writing Task 1 and Task 2 prompts, user essay submissions, and AI-based band score estimation, grammar correction, vocabulary suggestions, coherence feedback, and improved version generation. tasks.title: Implement Speaking Practice Module with Recording and AI Feedback

tasks.title: Implement Grammar Practice Module with Lessons, Quizzes, and Mistakes Review
tasks.description: Create backend models and services for grammar topics relevant to IELTS, including explanations, examples, quizzes, and mistakes review. Topics include tenses, articles, countable/uncountable nouns, relative clauses, conditionals, passive voice, complex sentences, conjunctions, and sentence structures. Develop frontend Grammar Practice page with lesson display, interactive quizzes, and mistakes review interface. Provide API endpoints for grammar data and user progress.
